rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ADA C. UNRUH FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of David Hillbrand, Executor Of The Will Of William James Shiloh Unruh, Deceased, To Petition For Determination Of Trustors Intent By Marjory Halligan
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Within 20 days of the order, Petitioner must allege in an amended petition any newly discovered facts that give rise to a new cause of action with an unexpired statute of limitations. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than August 23, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: *** TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY *** IN RE THE MATTER OF THE BOOKER PAGE SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Placing Certain Items Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion for Order Placing Certain Items Under Seal is granted in part and denied in part. There is a legitimate privacy interest in keeping one's financial information confidential. Petitioner's request to file a petition redacting the financial information regarding the recent confidential settlement agreement in related civil litigation is granted. However, the petition is denied as to the request that the entire Petition to Establish a Special Needs Trust and all related filings be sealed. The Court finds that this request is not narrowly tailored and is not the least restrictive means to protect Petitioner's overriding interest. (CRC, Rule 2.550(d).) The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than August 23, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to september 7, 2016. as stated in the notes, the declaration must be signed and verified by the petitioner. the exception allowing the attorney to sign does not apply in this case as the petitioner is seeking to be appointed as a fiduciary (CRC 7.103(c)), but see more, below. new deadline for filing the response in order to avoid an automatic continuance is thursday, september 1, 2016. NOTE-->the court deals only with the attorney of record or others in the same firm. suite-mates who are not partners do not qualify as attorneys of record.
